################################################
#                 MadDM v. 3.2                 #
################################################


################################################
# Relic Density                                #
################################################

Omegah2                       = 1.20e-01
Omegah_Planck                 = 1.20e-01
xsi                           = 1.00e+00 	 # xsi = (Omega/Omega_Planck)
x_f                           = 2.50e+01
sigmav_xf                     = 4.21e-27 	 # cm^3 s^-1
# % of the relic density channels
%_chichibar_za                = 100.00 %


################################################
# Indirect Detection                           #
################################################
# Results in brackets display [prediction, upper limit]

# Annihilation cross section computed with the method: madevent
# <sigma v>[cm^3 s^-1] of line spectrum final states and Fermi LAT 2015 line limits (if available, else -1)]
chichibar_za                  = [1.20e-30,2.30e-29]

# Global Fermi dSph Limit computed with pythia8 spectra
Total_xsec                    = [1.20e-30,2.30e-29]
Fermi_Likelihood              = -5.60e+00
Fermi_pvalue                  = 2.10e-01

# Gamma-line spectrum and line limits
# peak[GeV], flux[cm^-2 s^-1], J-factor[GeV^2 cm^-5]
# Fermi LAT 2015 (ArXiv:1503.02641)
ROI                           = 0.5
J-factor                      = 1.20e+23
peak_0(chichibar_za)          = 1.00e+02
flux_0                        = [1.20e-12,3.40e-12]
-2*log(Likelihood)_0          = 4.56e+00
p-value_0                     = 1.02e-01
peak_1(chichibar_za)          = 1.00e+02 	 # error: 2
flux_1                        = [2.30e-13,3.40e-12]
